title: pellaea articulata
intro: Pellaea articulata, also known as the articulata fern, is a species of fern in the family Pteridaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pellaea articulata include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. It can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is often used in folk medicine to treat various ailments.
